title: Rahul Shaw Personal Identity
text: Rahul Shaw is known for being honest, high-integrity, hardworking, learning-hungry, creative, adaptable, and practical as a problem solver. People often see Rahul as a one-stop solution person whenever they face problems because he enjoys troubleshooting, fixing issues, and finding workable solutions.

title: Rahul Shaw Education
text: Rahul Shaw completed a B.Tech in Electrical Engineering in 2021. His technical foundation started in electrical engineering before he transitioned toward full-stack web development, backend engineering, and AI-integrated web applications.

title: Rahul Shaw Career Journey
text: Rahul Shaw worked across multiple industries and domains after graduation before transitioning into tech. His transition was driven by a strong interest in technology from the beginning and by the accessibility of entry-level opportunities in the tech field. This journey shaped his adaptability, communication skills, operational awareness, and practical engineering mindset.

title: Rahul Shaw Hobbies And Mindset
text: Rahul Shaw enjoys traveling, playing BGMI, making DIY electronic gadgets, and fixing or troubleshooting problems. He has explored more than 70 percent of India. His mindset is centered on continuous learning, practical problem-solving, and entering a flow state while building or fixing things.
